arts.ttl: Honest Narcis Pelach tackles Stoke City problems with confidence he can fix them
arts.sum: Narcis Pelach wants to be as honest as possible with Stoke City supporters as he spells out areas he knows his team need to improve – and his confidence that it will. He is changing the way Stoke defend as a unit, with a focus on teamwork and space, but admits he needs to inject more aggression and work on conceding less ground to let in crosses or shots, as well as decision making in the final third and overall game management.
